mentions.note: Stock exploded but quarter results not good; revenues okay but earnings weak; pure speculation mode, not fundamental buy
GAAP profitable Q1 with full-year guidance, but Cramer focused on UnitedHealth and Cigna instead; acknowledges wasn't bullish enough earlier.
Cramer admits he was 'not bullish enough'; reported GAAP profitability Q1 and guided full-year profitability, but prefers UNH and CBS as superior healthcare plays.
